mandatory_work_exp: There’s no better way to find out what you love doing than trying it out for yourself, which is why a work placement 2 can often be beneficial. Work placements usually occur between your second and final year of study. They’re a great way to help you explore your potential career path and gain valuable work experience, whilst developing transferable skills for the future.
